_comment: Model reference for composing prompts. REFERENCE ONLY — verify current model IDs in the official Claude docs before relying on them. The console does not call any model; this is a lookup table. Update 'updated' when you refresh it.
note: Default to the latest, most capable Claude model for new AI work unless a smaller/faster model is a deliberate cost choice.

items.bestFor: Hardest reasoning, long agentic coding, deepest tasks
Balanced quality/speed for most coding + agent work
Fast, cheap, high-volume or latency-sensitive tasks
